span.p:
UUID v4
✓ No coordination
✓ No information leak
✗ Not sortable
✗ Poor index locality

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
UUID v7
✓ Time-sortable
✓ No coordination
✓ RFC standardized
○ Millisecond precision

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Snowflake
✓ Time-sortable
✓ 64-bit compact
○ Requires worker IDs
○ ~4M IDs/sec/worker

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ULID
✓ Time-sortable
✓ Monotonic in ms
✓ 26-char compact
○ Not RFC standardized
